_comment: Machine-checkable answer keys for the ollama-matrix eval. Each task lists items; grade.py extracts the model's per-item verdict by regex and scores against expect. 'mode' selects the extractor.

think-01-reconcile-evidence.notes: T8 is the precision trap: PR #169 implements it but is only proposed (not in the merged list) -> KEEP is correct.

think-02-prioritization.notes: high: C,B,A (C,B tie on 06-12 deadline -> lower effort C(2) before B(5); A is 06-20). medium: D(06-10) before F(06-25). low: E.

think-03-contradiction.notes: S3 says a local ollama default exists; S4 says no playbook uses ollama. Only contradicting pair.

think-04-temporal-cadence.notes: Fires Wed 06-03, Thu 06-04, Fri 06-05, Mon 06-08 (weekends skipped) = 4 missed; next is Tue 06-09 09:00.

think-05-abstention.notes: Q3 (gpt-oss tok/s) and Q4 (author) are not in the facts -> INSUFFICIENT. Q5 is a strict deduction (7 GB < 12 GB) -> answerable.

think-06-multihop.notes: B disabled by #200, but #200 reverted by #205 (merged) -> B enabled -> A functional re B. C/D facts are distractors.
